name: Luminex Resources Corp.
description: Luminex Resources Corp. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the discovery and advancement of gold and copper projects in Ecuador. The company holds a significant portfolio of mineral concessions, including its flagship Condor Gold-Copper project located in the Zamora-Chinchipe Province. By leveraging its technical expertise and strategic partnerships, Luminex aims to unlock value through the exploration and evaluation of high-potential mineral properties, contributing to the development of the mining sector in Ecuador while maintaining a commitment to responsible resource management and corporate growth.
